descriptionText: Multiplast Custom Tender 12 For Sale 1999 | Tax PaidOnly 100 hours engine use!!!!The Multiplast Custom Tender 12 For Sale 1999 represents a practical opportunity for anyone seeking a reliable, well‑built tender with a solid history and professional craftsmanship. Built in 1999 by the respected Multiplast yard in Vannes, this 12.68‑metre tender carries Italian flag registration and is currently available for viewing in Liguria. Known for producing robust composite vessels, Multiplast created a model that remains appreciated for its stability, generous deck spaces and straightforward functionality. This particular example has been maintained with care over the years and is presented in good condition, making her a suitable option for private use, support duties, or day cruising. Known for producing robust composite vessels, Multiplast created a model that remains appreciated for its stability, generous deck spaces and straightforward functionality. This particular example has been maintained with care over the years and is presented in good condition, making her a suitable option for private use, support duties, or day cruising.
